title: Lawrence Washington and the War Before the Revolution
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Before George Washington became the best-known Virginian in the world, he looked up to an older half-brother who had already seen war. This factual narrative follows Lawrence Washington from colonial Virginia to Admiral Vernon's disastrous Caribbean campaign, then back to the Potomac where his choices helped shape George's future.

chapters.title: An Older Brother in an Expanding Empire
Mount Vernon and the Younger Brother Watching
The Road to Barbados, and What Remained
